requirement_topic.en: EAEU TR CU 004/2011 Low-Voltage Safety, IEC 61851, and Cold / Altitude Design
requirement_topic.zh: EAEU TR CU 004/2011低压安全、IEC 61851及低温/海拔设计
requirement_topic.zht: EAEU TR CU 004/2011低壓安全、IEC 61851及低溫/海拔設計

summary.en: Kyrgyzstan is an EAEU member state, so EV chargers placed on the Kyrgyzstan market may require EAEU conformity assessment and EAC marking where they fall within TR CU 004/2011 on low-voltage equipment. In addition to the EAEU route, Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC evidence and project specifications may require IEC 61851-1 for conductive EVSE general safety and IEC 61851-23 for DC EVSE. Product evidence should address shock protection, protective earthing, insulation, overcurrent, overtemperature, interlocks, emergency stop where applicable, enclosure protection, installation instructions, and the exact charger configuration. Kyrgyzstan's winter conditions and mountainous terrain make cold-start behavior, heating, condensation control, altitude derating, and dielectric / cooling margins practical acceptance issues.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦是EAEU成员国，因此投放吉尔吉斯斯坦市场的电动汽车充电桩在落入TR CU 004/2011低压设备范围时，可能需要EAEU合格评定和EAC标志。除EAEU路径外，Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC证据和项目规格可能要求IEC 61851-1传导式EVSE通用安全，以及直流EVSE的IEC 61851-23。产品证据应覆盖防触电、保护接地、绝缘、过流、过温、互锁、适用时急停、外壳防护、安装说明和准确充电桩配置。吉尔吉斯斯坦冬季条件和山地地形使低温启动、加热、冷凝控制、海拔降额以及介电/散热裕量成为实际验收问题。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦是EAEU成員國，因此投放吉爾吉斯斯坦市場的電動汽車充電樁在落入TR CU 004/2011低壓設備範圍時，可能需要EAEU合格評定和EAC標誌。除EAEU路徑外，Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC證據和項目規格可能要求IEC 61851-1傳導式EVSE通用安全，以及直流EVSE的IEC 61851-23。產品證據應覆蓋防觸電、保護接地、絕緣、過流、過溫、互鎖、適用時急停、外殼防護、安裝說明和準確充電樁配置。吉爾吉斯斯坦冬季條件和山地地形使低溫啟動、加熱、冷凝控制、海拔降額以及介電/散熱裕量成為實際驗收問題。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On safety of low-voltage equipment
EAEU EAC marking and conformity assessment rules for products in technical-regulation scope
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — IP Code for enclosure protection
Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC evidence where adopted or requested

summary.en: China's comparable charger safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, together with GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication where applicable. Chinese factory tests, CB reports, IEC reports, and component certificates can support review, but a China GB/T report is not an EAC certificate or declaration and does not by itself prove IEC 61851 acceptance for a Kyrgyzstan project.
summary.zh: 中国可比充电桩安全基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并结合GB/T 20234接口标准和适用时的GB/T 27930-2023直流通信。中国工厂测试、CB报告、IEC报告和部件证书可支持审查，但中国GB/T报告不是EAC证书或声明，也不能单独证明满足吉尔吉斯斯坦项目的IEC 61851接受要求。
summary.zht: 中國可比充電樁安全基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並結合GB/T 20234接口標準和適用時的GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊。中國工廠測試、CB報告、IEC報告和部件證書可支持審查，但中國GB/T報告不是EAC證書或聲明，也不能單獨證明滿足吉爾吉斯斯坦項目的IEC 61851接受要求。

gap.en: The practical gap is EAEU procedure plus technical adaptation. Confirm whether the charger is within TR CU 004/2011 scope, identify the EAC declaration or certification route, prepare Russian and locally required manuals / labels, map GB/T safety evidence to IEC 61851 clauses, and document cold-climate / high-altitude operation for the exact model and firmware. China domestic GB/T evidence is useful input but not a Kyrgyzstan market-access decision.
gap.zh: 实际差距是EAEU程序加技术适配。应确认充电桩是否落入TR CU 004/2011范围，确定EAC声明或认证路径，准备俄文及当地要求的说明书/标签，将GB/T安全证据映射至IEC 61851条款，并针对准确型号和固件记录寒冷气候/高海拔运行能力。中国国内GB/T证据可作为输入，但不是吉尔吉斯斯坦市场准入结论。
gap.zht: 實際差距是EAEU程序加技術適配。應確認充電樁是否落入TR CU 004/2011範圍，確定EAC聲明或認證路徑，準備俄文及當地要求的說明書/標籤，將GB/T安全證據映射至IEC 61851條款，並針對準確型號和韌體記錄寒冷氣候/高海拔運行能力。中國國內GB/T證據可作為輸入，但不是吉爾吉斯斯坦市場准入結論。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger is within TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage equipment scope and is placed on the Kyrgyzstan / EAEU market; IEC 61851 or GOST / IEC evidence may also be mandatory under tender, project-owner, grid-operator, lender, or Kyrgyzstandart requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 evidence applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not an EAC or Kyrgyzstandart approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kyrgyzstan's EAEU membership makes TR CU 004/2011 and EAC marking a genuine pathway for in-scope EV chargers. Treat GB/T 18487 as input evidence only, then close the EAC, IEC 61851, labelling, cold-climate, and high-altitude gaps for the exact charger configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉尔吉斯斯坦的EAEU成员身份使TR CU 004/2011和EAC标志成为范围内电动汽车充电桩的真实路径。应仅将GB/T 18487作为输入证据，然后针对准确充电桩配置补齐EAC、IEC 61851、标签、寒冷气候和高海拔差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉爾吉斯斯坦的EAEU成員身份使TR CU 004/2011和EAC標誌成為範圍內電動汽車充電樁的真實路徑。應僅將GB/T 18487作為輸入證據，然後針對準確充電樁配置補齊EAC、IEC 61851、標籤、寒冷氣候和高海拔差距。
